ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the vendor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the vendor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the vendor */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the vendor is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the vendor is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the vendor */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the vendor */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Insurance provider of the vendor */,
  "fleet_size" INTEGER /* Number of taxis in the vendor's fleet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxis" (
  "taxi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taxi */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor that owns the taxi */,
  "medallion_number" TEXT /* Medallion number of the taxi */,
  "license_plate_number" TEXT /* License plate number of the taxi */,
  "vehicle_make" TEXT /* Make of the taxi vehicle */,
  "vehicle_model" TEXT /* Model of the taxi vehicle */,
  "vehicle_year" INTEGER /* Year of the taxi vehicle */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the taxi vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taxi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Name of the driver */,
  "driver_license_number" TEXT /* Driver's license number */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the driver */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the driver */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the driver is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the driver is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rides" (
  "ride_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ride */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor that provided the ride */,
  "taxi_id" INTEGER /* ID of the taxi that provided the ride */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver who provided the ride */,
  "pickup_datetime" TEXT /* DateTime when the ride was picked up */,
  "dropoff_datetime" TEXT /* DateTime when the ride was dropped off */,
  "passenger_count" INTEGER /* Number of passengers in the ride */,
  "trip_distance" REAL /* Distance of the ride in miles */,
  "ratecode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rate code used for the ride */,
  "store_and_fwd_flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating whether the ride was stored and forwarded */,
  "pulocation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pickup location */,
  "dolocation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drop-off location */,
  "payment_type" INTEGER /* Type of payment used for the ride */,
  "fare_amount" REAL /* Base fare amount for the ride */,
  "extra" REAL /* Extra charges for the ride (e.g. tolls) */,
  "mta_tax" REAL /* MTA tax for the ride */,
  "tip_amount" REAL /* Tip amount for the ride */,
  "tolls_amount" REAL /* Tolls amount for the ride */,
  "improvement_surcharge" REAL /* Improvement surcharge for the ride */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount for the ride */,
  "ride_status" TEXT /* Status of the ride (e.g. completed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ride_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rides_ratecode_id FOREIGN KEY ("ratecode_id") REFERENCES rate_codes ("ratecode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rides_dolocation_id FOREIGN KEY ("dolocation_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rides_taxi_id FOREIGN KEY ("taxi_id") REFERENCES taxis ("taxi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rides_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rides_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rides_pulocation_id FOREIGN KEY ("pulocation_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "borough" TEXT /* Borough where the location is located */,
  "zone" TEXT /* Zone where the location is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "ride_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ride that the payment was made for */,
  "payment_type" INTEGER /* Type of payment made (e.g. credit card, cash) */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g. Visa, Mastercard) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_ride_id FOREIGN KEY ("ride_id") REFERENCES rides ("ride_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rate_codes" (
  "ratecode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rate code */,
  "rate_code" TEXT /* Name of the rate code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rate code */,
  "base_fare" REAL /* Base fare for the rate code */,
  "per_unit" REAL /* Per unit charge for the rate code */,
  "per_minute" REAL /* Per minute charge for the rate code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ratecode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_data" (
  "traffic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic data point */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the traffic data was collected */,
  "traffic_date" TEXT /* Date when the traffic data was collected */,
  "traffic_time" TEXT /* Time when the traffic data was collected */,
  "traffic_volume" INTEGER /* Volume of traffic */,
  "traffic_speed" REAL /* Speed of traffic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("traffic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)
